mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO finance_opening_balance ( company_id, period, subject_code, subject_name, opening_amount, locked, status, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.companyId}, #{item.period}, #{item.subjectCode}, #{item.subjectName}, #{item.openingAmount}, #{item.locked}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE subject_name = VALUES(subject_name), opening_amount = VALUES(opening_amount), status = VALUES(status), remark = VALUES(remark), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
